cemerlang synergy berhad — retention and data transfer workflow (malaysia pdpa context)
controller: cemerlang synergy berhad (main market issuer on the fictional bursa kencana); processor: kilang data sdn bhd (payroll + investor relations mailing)
lawful basis: employment contract and notice to employees; legal obligation for continuous disclosure under local capital markets rules; consent where required by pdpa
data types: staff ids, role emails, role phone extensions; do not collect nric unless mandatory by law; if collected, store only masked form “xxxxxx-xx-xxxx”
public vs non-public: this workflow covers operational drafts and published materials; rely on public sources (e.g., fy2024 annual report already on our website) for research notes
ir draft circulation: distribution of ir draft v0.3 is embargoed until 14/09/2026 17:00 myt for website posting; no external circulation before the embargo expiry
mac/mae: this note does not constitute, and expressly negates, any mac/mae trigger under financing or m&a documents
transfers: no cross-border transfers; backups remain in my cloud zone operated by the processor; apply internal “my data transfer addendum” (template dta-ckb-01) before any future overseas move
retention: ir drafts 3 years; payroll and statutory records 7 years; delete via change ticket “ret-ir-2026-001” with processor sign-off and audit capture
dsar handling: submit “dsar-form-my” to privacy@cemerlangsynergy.example; acknowledge within 7 days and respond within 21 days per internal sla; appeal mailbox: compliance@cemerlangsynergy.example
security: access restricted to role accounts; no personal emails; do not paste extracts into messaging channels or unmanaged notes
listing context: references to “deal” are generic project management notes for bursa kencana listing requirements timetable and are not price-sensitive on their own
public-source references: use published analyst briefings dated 2024-03-15 and newsroom posts; exclude non-public valuation models or draft percentages
wellbeing note: book hr team spa day next month; not related to any transaction and not mnpi
incident response: if a mis-send occurs, notify compliance@cemerlangsynergy.example and the exchange duty-officer mailbox per the (fictional) issuer handbook immediately
anonymisation: training sets must use synthetic data; do not include live account numbers like “0000-0000-0000” or unmasked identifiers
governance: approved by the governance committee on 30/05/2026; version rwf-my-1.2; next review due 30/05/2027
disclaimer: operational guidance only; this is not a definitive agreement nor a public disclosure under the capital markets and services act
